Add GitHub Actions workflows (#1)

- Add GitHub Actions workflows for CI, benchmarks, CodeQL and linting.
- Avoid using splatting to fix using `*` filter on Linux.
- Do not follow HTTP redirects.
- Allow logging to be overridden per benchmark.
- Fix the ASP.NET Core development certificate not being trusted.
